subject: Re: View report
customer_message:
Hi. When I click on view report it lands on payment page. I don't see any
check box to select option to contribute data

On Mon, 4 May 2026, 14:51 Customer Support Flowmingo, <support@flowmingo.ai>
wrote:

> Dear Pooja,
>
> To view your evaluation report for free, you must select the option to
> contribute your data for AI training. Otherwise, a payment is required to
> access the detailed report.
>
> If you have already opted to contribute your data and are still being
> directed to the payment page, please let us know.
>
> Best regards,
>
>
> On Fri, May 1, 2026 at 12:30 AM Pooja Kamlesh <ompooja15@gmail.com> wrote:
>
>> When I click on view report. It opens payment page.
>>
>> On Thu, 30 Apr 2026, 21:44 Customer Support Flowmingo, <
>> support@flowmingo.ai> wrote:
>>
>>> Dear Pooja,
>>>
>>> Thank you for your inquiry about viewing your evaluation report. You are
>>> only required to pay for add-ons, such as practice interviews or detailed
>>> AI assessme

sent_reply:
Hi Pooja,

Could you please provide the specific link you are clicking on to view your
report?

This will help us investigate why the option to contribute data for AI
training is not appearing for you.

Best regards,


On Mon, May 4, 2026 at 4:32 PM Pooja Kamlesh <ompooja15@gmail.com> wrote:

>>>> Dear Pooja,
>>>>
>>>> Thank you for your inquiry about viewing your evaluation report. You
>>>> are only required to pay for add-ons, such as practice interviews or
>>>> detailed AI assessment reports.
>>>>
>>>> However, there’s an option to get it for free if you contribute data
>>>> for AI training.
>>>>
>>>> To view your report, please check the link in the email. Your report
>>>> should be available there if your interview has been completed.
>>>>
>>>> Let us know if you have any questions,
>>>>
